attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT   
    BK_COMPANY_CODE    ,           
	BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   ,   
	BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD ,
	BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,    
	BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT    ,    
	BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT    ,
	RANK () OVER 
	(ORDER BY BK_COMPANY_CODE,BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD,
			 BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT ) + MAX_VAL BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
	(-1*( BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT *100 + BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT )||trim(999) ) as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
	-999 as SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY   		
  FROM (select 
				BK_COMPANY_CD  as BK_COMPANY_CODE   ,           
				BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   ,   
				BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD ,
				BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   ,    
				BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT    ,    
				BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT    
			FROM 
					$$FINLGLVWDB.N_HFM_ACCOUNT_BALANCE NHB
				where 
					    SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ='N' 
					and BK_ROLLUP_CATEGORY_CD ='USD Total'
					and DEPARTMENT_TYPE ='FINANCIAL DEPARTMENT'
					and BK_COMPANY_CD = '010'
				group by 1,2,3,4,5,6
            ) SMHB,
       (SELECT COALESCE (MAX (BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT), 0) MAX_VAL  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_JE_LINE_HFM_ADJ ) SMMAX
 WHERE NOT EXISTS (          SELECT 1
            FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_JE_LINE_HFM_ADJ  SJELHB
           WHERE 
			        SJELHB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT        =     SMHB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT
				and SJELHB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT  = 		SMHB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT
				and SJELHB.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD  =		SMHB.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   
				and SJELHB.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD  =      SMHB.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD
				and SJELHB.BK_COMPANY_CODE           =  SMHB.BK_COMPANY_CODE      
				and SJELHB.BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD  =SMHB. BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD
   			 )

select 
SM.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT       as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT            
,SM.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT              
,SM.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,NHBI.BK_COMPANY_CD as BK_COMPANY_CODE               
,case when AMOUNT < 0  then  abs(AMOUNT) else  null end RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT          
,case when AMOUNT >=  0  then  abs(AMOUNT) else  null end  RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT           
,case when AMOUNT < 0  then  abs(AMOUNT) else  null end RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT      
,case when AMOUNT >= 0  then  abs(AMOUNT) else  null end RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT       
,case when AMOUNT < 0  then  abs(AMOUNT) else  null end RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT   
,case when AMOUNT >= 0  then  abs(AMOUNT) else  null end RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT    
,NHBI.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD as DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD   
,NHBI.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD as DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD       
,NHBI.BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD as DD_BK_DEPT_CD          
,(NHBI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  * 100 ) +NHBI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT   as DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT     
,FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE  
,case when AMOUNT < 0  then 'CREDIT' ELSE 'DEBIT' end as DEBIT_CREDIT_ENTRY_TYPE  
   , NHBI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT  
   , NHBI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT 
from
(
select 
	BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD     ,  
	BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD     , 
	NHB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT        ,
	NHB.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT       ,
	BK_COMPANY_CD                 ,
	BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD ,
	FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE       ,
	sum(  CONSOLIDATED_BALANCE_USD_AMT )  as AMOUNT
FROM 
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_HFM_ACCOUNT_BALANCE NHB,
	$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
	where 	        NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT  =     NHB.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT
			    and NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT =  NHB. BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT
		        and SOURCE_DELETED_FLG ='N' 
				and BK_ROLLUP_CATEGORY_CD ='USD Total'
				and DEPARTMENT_TYPE ='FINANCIAL DEPARTMENT'
				and BK_COMPANY_CD = '010'
			    and NFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_AGE in (0,1)  /* current month and Previous month */
	group by 1,2,3,4,5,6,7
) NHBI
 Inner join $$ETLVWDB.SM_JE_LINE_HFM_ADJ  SM
    	  on (  NHBI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT        =     SM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT
				and  NHBI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT    = 		SM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT
				and  NHBI.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD     =		SM.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   
				and NHBI.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD    =      SM.BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD
				and NHBI.BK_COMPANY_CD           =  SM.BK_COMPANY_CODE      
				and NHBI.BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD  =SM. BK_HFM_REPORTED_DEPARTMENT_CD   )
  Inner Join $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY NJE
		on  (SM.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT = NJE.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
		and  SM.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  = NJE.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY )

select 
WI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT  as  BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,
WI.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT as  BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,
WI.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as  SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
WI.BK_COMPANY_CODE as  BK_COMPANY_CODE,
WI.DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD   as  DD_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CD,
WI.DD_BK_DEPT_CD as  DD_BK_DEPT_CD,
WI.DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD as  DD_BK_FINANCIAL_LOCATION_CD,
'Fiscal Year' as EFFECTIVE_DT_CALENDAR_CD,
WI.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT as  EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
WI.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT as  EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT,
WI.RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT as  RU_DV_USD_CREDIT_AMT,
WI.RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT as  RU_DV_USD_DEBIT_AMT,
WI.RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT as  RU_FUNCTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
WI.RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT as  RU_FUNCTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
WI.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT as  RU_TRANSACTIONAL_CREDIT_AMT,
WI.RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT as  RU_TRANSACTIONAL_DEBIT_AMT,
'HFM' as SS_CD,
-994 as  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
-999 as  DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_LOCALITY_INT,
-999 as  DD_BK_FIN_ACCT_LOCALITY_INT,
-999 as  DD_BK_PROJECT_LOCALITY_INT,
'000' as DD_BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD,
'000000' as DD_BK_PROJECT_CD,
'MC' as  DD_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_MAPPED_CD, 
WI.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT as  DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT,
-99999 RU_VENDOR_INVOICE_PAYMENT_KEY,
'USD' as BK_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
DEBIT_CREDIT_ENTRY_TYPE as  DEBIT_CREDIT_ENTRY_TYPE,
WI.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE as  EFFECTIVE_DT,
'N'  INTERCOMPANY_ROLE,
Null  JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE,
'NO REFERENCE' as  JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_TYPE_CD,
1 as  OVRD_TRX_FNC_CURR_CNV_RT,
Null as  RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_COMPANY_CD,
Null as  RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_DEPT_CD,
Null  as RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_ACCT_CD,
Null  as RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_FIN_LOC_CD,
Null  as RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_PROJECT_CD,
Null  as RU_OFFSET_LINE_GLA_SUBACCT_CD,
'HFM Consol Data' as JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_DESCR
from 
$$STGDB.WI_JEL_HFM_BAL_AMT WI
where (BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,BK_COMPANY_CODE  )
not in  ( select BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,BK_COMPANY_CODE 
          from  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE
		  where  SS_CD= 'HFM')

select 	
cast (  (-1*( NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT )||trim(999) ) as integer)  as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT   ,
-999 as SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              ,
'Y' as ACCRUAL_REVERSAL_FLG          ,
'UNKNOWN' as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_CATEGORY_NAME,
'UNKNOWN' as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_SOURCE_NAME  ,
NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE as CURRENCY_CONVERSION_DT        ,
'Fiscal Year' as EFFECTIVE_DT_CALENDAR_CD      ,
NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT as EFFECTIVE_DT_FSCL_YEAR_NUM_INT, 
NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT as EFFECTIVE_DT_MONTH_NUM_INT    , 
'UNKNOWN' as ENTERED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME      ,
-20000000 as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_ID_INT ,
'HFM Consol Header' as JOURNAL_ENTRY_DESCR           ,
'HFM Consol Header' as JOURNAL_ENTRY_NAME            ,
'=' as JOURNAL_ENTRY_REVERSAL_ROLE   ,
1 as OVRD_TRX_FNC_CURR_CNV_RT      ,
'N' as PARENT_ROLE                   ,
NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE  as POSTED_DTM                    , 
-999 as RU_PARENT_JRNL_ENTRY_NUM_INT  ,
-999 as RU_REVERSAL_JRNL_ENTRY_NUM_INT,
'HFM' as SS_CD                         ,
'N' as TAX_STATUS_FLG                ,
'USD' as TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD     ,
'HFM Consol Batch' as DD_JOURNAL_ENTRY_BATCH_NAME   
from 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM
where NFM.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_AGE in (-1,0,1) 
and 
(  cast (  (-1*( NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT *100 + NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT )||trim(999) ) as integer)  ,-999 )
not in 
(select BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY
)
